calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Charles Santos, Appellant
Alexander Van Buren, Respondent

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

Charles Santos testifies on his own behalf
Alexander Van Buren testifies on his own behalf

Appellants provide group exhibits
Respondent provide group exhibits

The Court hears argument

All exhibits are returned in open court
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Jeffrey Wohl; Clerk: R. Goulding; Not Reported (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Aug-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-15-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-06-2016 Reset From Jan-27-17 To Feb-15-17 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
